MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kate Dyer, Esq. of Clarence & Dyer, 415-749-1800 specially appearing for petitioner and moving party Brian Marsland.
Sarah Wright, Esq., 415-472-5900 for respondent and opposing perty XEDOC Holdings.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows --
PETITIONER BRIAN MARSLAND'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT BY THE PETITIONER. THE COURT WILL FOLLOW CCP 1281.6 IN SELECTING AN ARBITRATOR. EACH SIDE WILL SUBMIT A LIST OF 5 ARBITRATORS TO DEPT. #503 BY 12/2/05 FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620. (301/ROBER)
